profile.name: Sergio Aguilar
profile.tagline: Computer Science graduate building trading systems, AI, and full-stack products.

categories.label: AI & Computer Vision
categories.blurb: Machine learning, computer vision, and intelligent systems.

categories.label: Trading & Finance
categories.blurb: Algorithmic trading, backtesting, and market tooling.

categories.label: Game Development
categories.blurb: Real-time multiplayer and Roblox game systems.

projects.title: Gold Trading Algorithm
projects.summary: Backtested algorithmic trading system for gold futures with Monte Carlo simulation, prop-firm analysis, and live Telegram signals.
projects.description: A fully backtested algorithmic trading system for gold futures (GC). It combines a rules-based entry/exit engine with Monte Carlo simulation to stress-test thousands of equity-curve scenarios, prop-firm rule analysis to validate drawdown and daily-loss limits, and a live Telegram bot that pushes real-time trade signals.
highlights: Monte Carlo stress-testing of the equity curve

projects.title: Crypto Price Tracker
projects.summary: Real-time cryptocurrency tracker with interactive charts and portfolio tracking via CoinGecko API.
projects.description: A real-time cryptocurrency price tracker with interactive Chart.js graphs and basic portfolio tracking, powered by the CoinGecko API.

projects.title: STATBOARD — AI Sports Leaderboard
projects.summary: Real-time AI leaderboard for indoor sportsplexes using computer vision and UWB wristbands to auto-track player stats.
projects.description: A real-time, AI-powered leaderboard for indoor sportsplexes. It fuses computer-vision player tracking (YOLO) with UWB wristband positioning to automatically capture player stats — goals, distance, speed — and display them on live leaderboards with no manual scorekeeping.

projects.title: Soccer Video Analysis Pipeline
projects.summary: ML pipeline using YOLO and SoccerNet to track players, detect behaviors, and analyze full 90-minute matches.
projects.description: An end-to-end machine-learning pipeline that ingests full 90-minute soccer matches, uses YOLO and SoccerNet data to detect and track players across frames, and surfaces behavioral and positional analytics for the whole match.
highlights: Player detection and tracking with YOLO

projects.title: Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
projects.summary: Simulation environment for autonomous-vehicle algorithms with realistic physics and NEAT-evolved neural drivers.
projects.description: A simulation environment for testing autonomous-vehicle algorithms with realistic physics and sensor models. It uses NEAT (NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies) to evolve neural-network drivers that learn to navigate the track over generations.

projects.title: Automatic Note
projects.summary: Real-time audio transcription app using Python and the Whisper API with multi-threaded capture.
projects.description: A desktop application that transcribes audio in real time using Python and the Whisper API. Multi-threaded audio capture keeps recording smooth while transcription runs concurrently.

projects.title: Police Data with Threads
projects.summary: Multi-threaded C program analyzing police response times across 500K+ records with mutex-protected critical sections.
projects.description: A multi-threaded C program that analyzes police response times across 500K+ records. It uses pthreads to parallelize statistical calculations and mutex locks to protect critical sections, demonstrating safe concurrent access and performance optimization.

projects.title: Roblox Survival Game
projects.summary: Roblox survival tycoon with procedural tower generation, custom character physics, and drop-zone mechanics in Luau.
projects.description: A Roblox survival-tycoon game built in Luau inside Roblox Studio. It features procedural tower generation, custom character physics, and drop-zone mechanics that drive the core gameplay loop.

projects.title: Online Multiplayer Uno
projects.summary: Real-time online multiplayer Uno built as a team project with live game-state synchronization.
projects.description: A real-time, online multiplayer Uno card game built as a team project. It synchronizes live game state across players over WebSockets so every client stays in sync as cards are played.

projects.title: Discord Clone
projects.summary: Discord recreation with real-time messaging, channel creation, and Firebase authentication.
projects.description: A recreation of the Discord chat app with real-time messaging via Socket.io, channel creation, and Firebase-backed user authentication, styled with Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Netflix Clone
projects.summary: Netflix interface replica with responsive layouts and TMDB API integration for real movie data.
projects.description: A pixel-faithful replica of the Netflix interface with responsive layouts and TMDB API integration that pulls real movie and show data into the rows and hero banner.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.summary: Weather app with real-time conditions for any location and geolocation auto-detect via OpenWeather.
projects.description: A weather application that provides real-time conditions and forecasts for any location, with geolocation support to auto-detect the user's current position via the OpenWeather API.
